COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR RE: MAR-05-21 DEMURRER (TRANSACTION ID # 200023842) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOSELEY, RUSTY AN INDIVIDUAL HOSELEY CORPORATION

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-05-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS RUSTY HOSELEY AND HOSELEY CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER MAY BE FILED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IN PARTICULAR IS ORDERED TO OBEY CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY APRIL 2, 2021. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs RUSTY HOSELEY and HOSELEY CORPORATION's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is Defendants' demurrer to the amended complaint is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires a meet and confer "in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and Defendants' response to the amended complaint is now due by March 15, 2022.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS RUSTY HOSELEY AND HOSELEY CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. Plaintiff's counsel in particular is ordered to obey CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by April 2, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
